ogTitle: Crookayan vs Crooked River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crookayan and Crooked River.
heading: Crookayan vs Crooked River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crookayan, Victoria and Crooked River, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crooked River has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Crookayan (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crookayan or Crooked River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crookayan has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Crooked River scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crookayan scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Crooked River scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crookayan or Crooked River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crooked River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
